systemic_steady_equation.strength_term: A_system_steady = mix(S_system_score, R_system, S_stable_plus_score, M_brain_direct_v23, R_train_v29)
systemic_steady_equation.learning_term: L_system_steady = mix(L_system, L_stable_plus, D_feature_v23, B_plastic_v29, R_train_v29)
systemic_steady_equation.system_term: M_system_steady = A_system_steady + S_system_steady + R_system_steady + L_system_steady - P_system_steady
